key_observations: Group One has a 2.5 star Yelp rating against a market average of 3.13, with confirmed complaints around security deposit returns and incomplete repairs. Lead with how EliseAI creates documented, automated communication trails for maintenance and move-out workflows so residents feel heard and staff have a clear record to point to.

The company has been operating since 1971 with no detected tech stack, which suggests manual processes are deeply embedded. Frame EliseAI as a layer that works alongside existing operations rather than a replacement, and expect the conversation to require some education on what automation actually looks like day to day.

Corpus Christi shows strong income growth at 7.4% year over year despite flat population, which signals a stable renter base with rising expectations. Position EliseAI as a way to meet that rising bar for communication quality without adding headcount.
